name: proactive-vendor-discovery
description: Implement BuyAnything strict DB-first vendor sufficiency scoring with live external discovery, streaming, and candidate persistence

thresholds.description: Vendor-discovery-path searches branch through one orchestrated DB-first sufficiency seam
Borderline and insufficient coverage launch discovery without polluting canonical vendors synchronously

signals.description: Coverage scoring follows the locked heuristic-first sufficiency model
Discovery adapters, normalization, and dedupe stream useful results into the existing row flow
Persisted discovered candidates and enrichment queue records obey strict guardrails
Discovery sessions remain auditable through stable session ids and structured logs

approval.change_reason: initial approval for proactive vendor discovery build-all effort
